query:
WITH next_approval AS (
                SELECT id
                FROM approval_grants
                WHERE deployment_id = $1
                  AND thread_id = $2
                  AND tool_id = $3
                  AND grant_scope = $4
                  AND status = $5
                ORDER BY granted_at ASC
                LIMIT 1
            )
            UPDATE approval_grants approvals
            SET status = $6,
                consumed_at = $7,
                consumed_by_run_id = NULL
            FROM next_approval
            WHERE approvals.id = next_approval.id
            RETURNING approvals.id
